name: 祝福之锤
description: 对一个两格内敌人造成自身攻击力100%的物理伤害
code: function executeSkill(context) { const sourcePiece = context.piece; const targetEnemy = selectTarget({ type: 'piece', range: 2, filter: 'enemy' }); if (!targetEnemy || targetEnemy.needsTargetSelection) { return targetEnemy; } const damage = sourcePiece.attack; const damageResult = dealDamage(sourcePiece, targetEnemy, damage, 'physical', context.battle, context.skill.id); return { message: sourcePiece.name + '的祝福之锤对' + targetEnemy.name + '造成' + damageResult.damage + '点物理伤害', success: true }; }
previewCode: function calculatePreview(piece, skillDef) { const damage = piece.attack; return { description: '对两格内一个敌人造成' + damage + '点物理伤害（攻击力100%）', expectedValues: { damage: damage } }; }
